Name: Phase 1: Foundation
Deliverables: Staging environment deployed, Database schema created, Backend API endpoints operational, Environment variables configured
Success Criteria: Staging URL accessible, Database tables created, API endpoints return 200, All migrations successful

Name: Phase 2: Page Builder
Deliverables: Working page builder UI, 10+ content blocks, Block property panel, Save/load functionality, Undo/redo working
Success Criteria: User can drag blocks to canvas, Blocks are configurable, Pages save to database, Undo/redo works correctly

Name: Phase 3: Form Builder
Deliverables: Visual form designer, 10+ field types, Validation rule builder, Conditional logic, Form templates
Success Criteria: User can create form visually, Forms render dynamically, Validation works, Submissions save correctly

Name: Phase 4: Publishing Workflow
Deliverables: Draft/publish system, Version control, Environment promotion, Rollback capability
Success Criteria: Pages can be drafted, Publishing updates live site, Version history visible, Rollback restores correctly

Name: Phase 5: Asset Management
Deliverables: Media library UI, File upload system, Image optimization, Asset browser integration
Success Criteria: Files upload successfully, Images optimize automatically, Assets browsable, Integration with page builder works

Name: Phase 6: Polish & Testing
Deliverables: UI/UX refinements, Performance optimization, Comprehensive tests, Complete documentation, Beta testing complete
Success Criteria: All E2E tests pass, Performance benchmarks met, Documentation complete, Beta testers satisfied
